description: Mechanically enforces the plan-before-implement rule, validates diagrams.json/session.json on every write, re-verifies architecture-implementer's completion claim against disk, surfaces an unfinished pipeline on resume, and backstops mid-workflow checkpointing

hooks.prompt: If the architecture-designer:design or architecture-designer:review skill is currently mid-workflow (anywhere from Stage 6a through Step 13, or its review-skill equivalent step 4b through 4h), persist its state to disk right now, before compaction discards conversation-only context: update docs/architecture-designer/session.json's `progress`, `lld`, and `pending` keys per the architecture-designer plugin's skills/design/references/session-schema.md, and write the current unresolved reviewer report to docs/architecture-designer/last-review.md if a reviewer-fixer cycle is in progress. If neither skill is currently active, take no action.
